scenarios.name: Solo Baseline
scenarios.hypothesis: A localized task with one clear owner should favor the single-agent arm; multi-agent arms should pay coordination overhead without enough upside.
scenarios.expectedDivergence: single should have lower duration, fewer spans, fewer tool calls, and comparable artifact quality.

scenarios.name: Review And Revision
scenarios.hypothesis: A draft-review-revise task should reveal whether extra participants improve correctness enough to justify overhead.
scenarios.expectedDivergence: central or choreography should show explicit critique/revision evidence; single may be faster but more likely to miss edge cases.

scenarios.name: Webhook Burst Triage
scenarios.hypothesis: Bursty inbound events should reveal whether arms can deduplicate, prioritize, and avoid over-coordinating under load.
scenarios.expectedDivergence: single may process linearly; central should delegate independent incidents; choreography should show durable claims preventing duplicate work.
